mappings.context: PHG allows single or married buyers to receive up to $30,000 in housing grants if living within 4km of their parents/children.
EHG offers up to $120,000 for first-time buyer families subject to an income ceiling of $9,000.
Demolition of structural columns, reinforced concrete (RC) walls, or load-bearing components is strictly prohibited. Standard walls require HDB permit.
Refers to historical transaction price logs queried dynamically from data.gov.sg.
HDB owners must physically occupy their flat for 5 years (MOP) before they can sell or rent out the entire unit.
